# KRAMATRIX — India's #1 Premium Website Developer & Software Development Agency

## About
KRAMATRIX is a premium website development, application development, and software development agency headquartered in New Delhi, India. Founded with a mission to deliver exceptional digital experiences, KRAMATRIX has successfully completed 794+ projects with a 96% client satisfaction rate across 42+ technologies.

## Core Services
- Premium Website Development (Next.js, React, Vue.js, Angular, WordPress, Shopify)
- Mobile Application Development (React Native, iOS, Android, Flutter)
- Custom Software Development (SaaS, APIs, Microservices, Cloud-Native)
- AI & Machine Learning Solutions (Custom AI Agents, LLM Integration, Chatbots, ML Systems)
- E-Commerce Development (Shopify, WooCommerce, Custom Platforms, Payment Integration)
- UI/UX Design (Figma, Adobe XD, Design Systems, Prototyping)
- Web3 & Blockchain Development (Smart Contracts, DApps, NFT Platforms)
- CRM/ERP Development (Custom CRM, ERP Systems, Business Automation)
- Digital Transformation Consulting
- SEO & Performance Optimization
- Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps (AWS, GCP, Azure, Vercel, Docker, Kubernetes)
- API Development & Integration

## Key Differentiators
- 794+ projects delivered globally
- 96% client satisfaction rate
- 42+ technologies mastered
- Based in New Delhi, India with global clientele
- Expertise across 10+ industries including Health, Aviation, E-Commerce, Finance, Real Estate, Food & Hospitality
- Enterprise-grade solutions for startups to Fortune 500 companies

## Technology Stack
Next.js, React, Node.js, TypeScript, Python, Django, Ruby on Rails, PHP, Laravel, Vue.js, Angular, React Native, Swift, Kotlin, Flutter, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, AWS, GCP, Azure, Vercel, Docker, Kubernetes, GraphQL, REST APIs, Shopify, WordPress, Webflow, Figma, TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenAI, LangChain

## Industries Served
Health & Wellness, Aviation Technology, E-Commerce & Retail, Food & Hospitality, Business & Enterprise, Real Estate & Property, Finance & Accounting, Creative & Design, Education, SaaS & Technology
